title: The Archer's Healing Journey
headline: Your Sagittarian fire seeks not just distance, but the warmth of coming home to yourself.
punchline: The arrow you've been aiming outward now turns inward, piercing through old wounds to let light flood the shadows you've carried.
subtext: At 25, your healing requires releasing the belief that growth only happens through movement away—sometimes the deepest transformation comes from standing still and tending what's already within.

title: The Archer's Healing Journey

punchline: The arrow you've been aiming outward now turns inward, piercing through old wounds to let light flood the shadows you've carried.
subtext: At 25, your healing requires releasing the belief that growth only happens through movement away—sometimes the deepest transformation comes from standing still and tending what's already within.

title: The Archer's Return to the Heart
headline: Your journey has been outward, but healing calls you inward.
punchline: The arrow you've been launching into the world is turning back, not to wound, but to stitch the sky of your own soul.
subtext: Your natural expansiveness now serves a quieter purpose: to map the inner landscapes you've raced past, finding solace in the stillness you once avoided.
